hist_case.problem: SENTRY regression harness for deliberation v2.7 — first BuilderOS spin test
hist_case.case_text: Live pass-3 defects (B_NO_ROSTER_GATE, B_LB_METADATA, N5, N1-N3, N6b, N11, cleanup fingerprint) must not pass silently again. Mission is harness-only: consolidate probes into deterministic npm script + JSON receipt. No validator edits in this mission.
hist_case.opportunity: Prove BuilderOS converts defect catalog to machine-enforced work without founder decisions
hist_case.uncertainty: KNOW — probe IDs locked in REGRESSION_PROBE_CATALOG.json

note: Pre-seeded for BPB intake — load_bearing false (harness mission, no consensus required for FP gate)
